PG Programme in
Sports Management & Gaming

A 16-month full-time PGP that blends business strategy and growth with sports & gaming.

Apply Now

PG Programme in
Sports Management & Gaming

Format

Full Time

On Campus
(Opt-in residential)

Commencement Date

June 2026

Round 4 Deadline: 11th April '26

Eligibility

Bachelor’s Degree (Any)

Fresh Graduates (0–11 Months)
Early Professionals (1-5 Years)

Duration

16 Months

Including Live Projects, International & Domestic Immersions, Internship

Apply Now
  • Highlights
  • Curriculum
  • Immersions
  • Admissions & Fees
  • Career Prospects

Building Leaders for the
Business of Sport

Learn how global sports and gaming ecosystems operate- monetisation, league ops, franchise strategy, athlete brands, esports structures, and fan engagement.

Delivered by Experts

Business of Sport,
Delivered by Those Who Build It

Learn how global sports and gaming ecosystems run– monetisation, league ops, franchise strategy, athlete
brands, e-sports structures, and fan engagement engines.

Sports Treks

Inside the Engine Room of
India's Biggest Sports Leagues

Behind the scenes of the IPL, Kabaddi, and other leagues to learn how the biggest events in the world come to life.

Global Sports Immersions

International Immersions to
Top Sporting Events Across the World

Immersions for the most watched leagues & sporting events in the world - English Premier League in the UK, LA Liga in Spain, F1 Grand Prix races and ATP Tours.

Live Projects

Decode How Brands Use Sports &
Gaming to Scale and Build Loyalty

Work on real-world brand challenges within sports ecosystems and understand how communities drive engagement, loyalty, and revenue. Collaborate with leading organisations to design growth strategies that turn fans into lifelong brand advocates.

Venture Initiation Programme

Build Your Own
Sports or Gaming Start-up

Work on a real idea- fantasy leagues, D2C sports brands, athlete management, tournaments, tech & AI in sports. Pitch your idea to real investors on Demo Day.

Content Creator Challenge

Launch Your Sports
Creator Journey

Turn your love for sports into influence and grow your
personal brand.

MEET OUR CREATOR ALUMS

Charin’s Shit

@shittorlit

Dibyansu Mohanty

@actually.dibs

Madhav Nangru

@madhavrox

Download CCC Report

Sports Streaming Challenge

Create Your Own Twitch Channel
& Stream to 1M+Viewers

Go inside the world of sports streaming. See how platforms earn, grow and scale and build your own channel from scratch.

Download CCC Report

Dropshipping Challenge

Generate 1Cr+ Revenue-
Learn the Fundamentals of Business

Target 1 Cr+ in revenue by building and scaling your own sports treks e-commerce ventures.

Download Dropshipping Report

India as Your Classroom

Industry Immersion in
Every Term

Travel to Jalandhar to learn manufacturing & supply chain at Nivia, understand broadcasting & commercial rights in Mumbai & other similar industry immersions for hands-on learning.

Global Trek and Immersions

Global Centres of Excellence:
Immersive Study Tours

Travel to global sports and gaming hubs to experience how world-class organizations operate at scale. Engage with industry leaders, visit iconic venues, and gain first-hand insights into international best practices and innovation.

Treks and Immersions

Global Centres of Excellence:
Immersive Study Tours

Travel to Cruyff Institute in Spain, Esports and Gaming festival in Dubai and other locations. Engage with leaders, visit iconic venues, and gain first-hand insights into international best practices and innovations.

Learn by Doing
Not Just by Sitting in Lectures

Learn by Doing
Not Just by Sitting in Lectures

Masters’ Union brings its ‘learning by doing’ approach to sports- preparing
you for careers in management, media, analytics, and entrepreneurship in
this growing ecosystem.

Learn Directly from
Top CXOs & Sports Entrepreneurs

Learn from full-time faculty, sports & gaming founders, CXOs, and former athletes.

1

Live case studies with CXOs from top sports platforms

2

Direct mentorship by ex-athletes and gaming pioneers

3

Industry-led workshops and immersive projects

Shaping Leaders at the Intersection of
Sports & Analytics

The curriculum spans 8 Terms.

1

Terms 1–2: Core business concepts with the PGP-TBM cohort

2

Terms 3–5: Courses in sports management, e-sports, media, or AI & analytics

3

Term 6-8: Immersions, live projects, internships

Learn Business by Building a
Sports or Gaming Startup

Tournaments, Fantasy Leagues, analytics- make real revenue.

1

Term 1: Dropshipping Challenge to understand the science of selling

2

Term 2: Fantasy League Challenges, Campus Cups and more

3

Term 3 Onwards: Work on your startup idea

Learn Directly from
Top CXOs & Sports Entrepreneurs

Learn from full-time faculty, sports & gaming founders, CXOs, and former athletes.

1

Live case studies with CXOs from top sports platforms

2

Direct mentorship by ex-athletes and gaming pioneers

3

Industry-led workshops and immersive projects

The curriculum spans 8 Terms.

1

Terms 1–2: Core business concepts with the PGP-TBM cohort

2

Terms 3–5: Courses in sports management, e-sports, media, or AI & analytics.

3

Term 6-8: Immersions, live projects, internships

Sports or Gaming Startup

Tournaments, Fantasy Leagues, analytics- make real revenue.

1

Term 1: Dropshipping Challenge to understand the science of selling

2

Term 2: Fantasy League Challenges, Campus Cups and more

3

Term 3 Onwards: Work on your startup idea

Why Sports Management & Gaming,
Why Now?

The global sports economy exceeds $600 billion, with India’s 400+ million gamers & sports fans driving 15% annual growth. These industries now shape billion-dollar opportunities in leagues, fan engagement, and digital innovation.

The Masters’ Union PGP in Sports Management & Gaming (SMG) helps you turn your passion into a career- managing leagues, building ventures, and shaping athlete and gaming brands.

16 Student-led Clubs:
Connecting & Building Beyond Class

Masters’ Union hosts 16 student-led clubs that go beyond classroom
learning, helping students connect, unwind, and grow through shared
interests and hands-on experiences.

  • Sports Club
  • Creator Club
  • Socio Cultural Club
  • Fintech Club
  • FOCOS Club
  • Consulting Club
  • B2B Club
  • Third Block Club
  • Prodman Club
  • AI and Analytics Wing
  • The Marketing Society
  • EdTechClub
  • CommerceX Club
  • SEWA Club
  • Belong Club
  • Shastra Club

Sports Club

Sports Club fosters fitness, unity, and resilience through campus sports and represents MU with pride at intercollege tournaments.

Creator Club

The Creators Club unites students passionate about content and storytelling to collaborate, experiment, and create impactful ideas.

Socio Cultural Club

The Socio-Cultural Club celebrates art, culture, and community through vibrant events and performances that go beyond the classroom.

Fintech Club

The FinTech Club explores innovations shaping modern finance through industry talks and projects that build practical understanding.

FOCOS Club

The club supports students aiming for Founder’s Office and Chief of Staff roles through engaging, gamified learning and guided practice.

Consulting Club

MUCC equips students with real-world consulting skills through case prep, live projects, and collaborative learning.

B2B Club

B2B Club empowers students to explore MSMEs and family businesses, highlighting sectors beyond startups and placements.

Third Block Club

TBC Club builds a hands-on community exploring blockchain, digital assets, and Web3 through interactive workshops and discussions.

Prodman Club

The PM Club builds future product leaders who bridge business, design, and tech through strategy sessions and hands-on projects.

AI and Analytics Wing

AI & Analytics Wing empowers students to apply data-driven thinking via hands-on projects, simulations, and case challenges.

The Marketing Society

Marketing Society helps students learn and experiment with brand strategy, consumer insights, and storytelling in action.

EdTech Club

EdTech Club drives innovation in learning by exploring how technology transforms education and the startup ecosystem.

CommerceX Club

CommerceX explores operations, supply chains, and efficiency through workshops, speaker sessions, and industry visits.

SEWA Club

SEWA Club drives student-led social impact and community work, inspiring members to give back beyond academics and careers.

Belong Club

Belong builds a culture of empathy and inclusion at MU, creating a safe space where every student feels seen, supported, and connected.

Shastra Club

Shastra Club brings ancient Indian knowledge to life, exploring how timeless ideas can shape modern leadership and management.

Shastra Club

Shastra Club brings ancient Indian knowledge to life, exploring how timeless ideas can shape modern leadership and management.

Shastra Club

Shastra Club brings ancient Indian knowledge to life, exploring how timeless ideas can shape modern leadership and management.

Life at Masters' Union

Glimpse of Student Life

Explore Student Projects

Explore Student Projects

Experience the excellence of our student community - a glimpse into what you can achieve here.

Engage with Clubs

Engage with Clubs

Join diverse clubs to connect, collaborate, and grow beyond the classroom.

Student Entrepreneurship

Student Entrepreneurship

Discover how our students learn business by running a business in real-time.
Glimpse of Student Life

Learn Core Business Fundamentals &
Specialize In Sports Management Term 3 Onwards

Business Foundations

Build core business skills in economics, finance, marketing, and communication to form a strong base for sports and gaming leadership.

  • In Class: Core Courses
  • Out Class
  • Communication and Self-Development: How to Give an Inspiring Speech
  • Finance & Fintech: How to Read and Analyse Financial Statements
  • Sales & Marketing: How to Advertise Without Spending Money
  • Management & Strategy: How to Work Effectively in Teams
  • Product & Tech: How to Set Up an E-commerce Website
  • AI & ML: How to Master Prompt Engineering to Leverage Generative AI
  • Liberal Arts: Shifting World Order & World Politics After 9/11 and Covid
  • Dropshipping Challenge: From running marketing campaigns to managing supply chains, students build their own websites and compete for revenue
  • Domestic Immersion: From corporates, leagues to gaming studios and stadiums, gain real-world insights and industry-ready skills.

Strategy & Growth

Learn strategy, product, data, and operations by solving real business problems and running a live sports tournament simulation.

  • In Class: Core Courses
  • Out Class
  • Communication & Self Development: How to Manage Personal Finances?
  • Finance & Fintech: How to Create an MIS for a Business
  • Sales & Marketing: How to Execute CRO and Increase AOV
  • Management & Strategy: How a Country's Economy Works
  • Product & Tech: How to Develop a Product Mindset
  • AI & ML: How LLMs & AI Actually Work
  • Liberal Arts How Countries Grow & Make Money
  • Pre-Seed Cheque Challenge: Validate and present your startup idea to fight for 15+ lakhs in pre-seed funding, and build your Minimum Viable Product (MVP)
  • Domestic Immersion: Travel to Jalandhar to learn manufacturing & supply chain at Nivia, understand broadcasting & commercial rights in Mumbai & other similar industry immersions for hands on learning.
  • Start your own Sports Tournament: Run a pickleball / padel tournament in Delhi-NCR

The Business of Sport

Dive into global sports, leagues, teams, events, and athlete brands while creating real fan-engagement solutions for sports businesses.

  • In Class: Core Courses
  • Out Class
  • Global Sports Ecosystems: How major leagues, teams, and federations operate across the world.
  • League & Team Management: What it takes to run, scale, and manage professional sports teams and leagues.
  • Sports Marketing & Sponsorships: How brands activate, measure, and monetise partnerships in sport.
  • Athlete Brand Management: How athletes build, grow, and protect their personal brands.
  • Course: Venue & Event Operations How to handle logistics, safety, budgeting, and fan experience for large sports events.
  • VIP - MVP: Transform classroom learning into a live, test-ready product for the gaming & sports market.
  • Sports Trek: Go behind the scenes of leagues, teams, and gaming studios with curated on-ground sports treks.
  • Sports Streaming Challenge: Go inside the world of sports streaming. See how platforms earn, grow and scale and build your own channel from scratch

Gaming, Media & Technology

Master gaming, esports, digital media, and sports tech through hands-on content, broadcast, and data projects shaping modern sport.

  • In Class: Core Courses
  • Out Class
  • Gaming Economics & Monetisation: How to build and monetise games through in-app revenue, ads, and subscriptions.
  • E-Sports Operations & Community Building: How to run e-sports teams, tournaments, leagues, and fan communities.
  • Digital Media & Sports Broadcasting: How streaming, rights, production, and broadcast networks shape the industry.
  • Fan Engagement & Content Strategy: How to create content that attracts, engages, and monetises sports fans.
  • Sports Tech, Data & Performance Analytics: How to use AI, sensors, and analytics to improve athletes, teams, and decisions.
  • VIP - GTM: Craft a powerful GTM strategy that showcases your edge, ensures smooth market entry, and delivers real value to users.
  • International Immersion: Experience global sports and gaming ecosystems through immersive industry visits, workshops, and live league exposure abroad.

Strategy, Analytics & Leadership

Gain expertise in sports finance, analytics, law, future tech, and high-performance leadership to make strategic industry decisions.

  • In Class: Core Courses
  • Out Class
  • Sports Finance & Revenue Models: How to understand valuations, P&Ls, salaries, transfer fees, and revenue levers.
  • Data-Driven Decision-Making in Sport: How to use dashboards, metrics, and models for high-stakes decisions.
  • Sports Law, Ethics & Governance: How to navigate contracts, regulations, athlete rights, and league governance.
  • Future of Sports & Gaming: How AI, AR/VR, wearables, and new tech will reshape the next decade.
  • Leadership in High-Performance Teams: How to lead athletes, creators, and sports organisations under pressure.
  • VIP- PMF: Sharpen your product, reduce CAC with smarter strategy, and demonstrate genuine user stickiness. Bring your sports league idea to life as part of the journey.
  • Domestic Immersion: Travel to cities in India to meet, learn and experience how leagues, clubs, corporates actually run.

Live Industry Project / Internship

Work directly with top sports or gaming organisations to deliver real outcomes through a full-term, industry-backed project.

  • In Class: Core Courses
  • Out Class
  • Sports Finance & Revenue Models: How to understand valuations, P&Ls, salaries, transfer fees, and revenue levers.
  • Data-Driven Decision-Making in Sport: How to use dashboards, metrics, and models for high-stakes decisions.
  • Sports Law, Ethics & Governance: How to navigate contracts, regulations, athlete rights, and league governance.
  • Future of Sports & Gaming: How AI, AR/VR, wearables, and new tech will reshape the next decade.
  • Leadership in High-Performance Teams: How to lead athletes, creators, and sports organisations under pressure.
  • Consulting or entrepreneurial project with a sports franchise, foundations, sports marketing companies and gaming studios.
  • Apply classroom learnings in real operations, sponsorship, data, or product functions.
  • Faculty and industry mentorship throughout.
  • Raising-the-Seed-Fund Challenge: Present your startup ideas to VC’s in a typical Shark Tank manner to raise funding against equity

100+ Empaneled
Industry Experts

Our course is taught by leading Sports/E-Sports Founders, CXOs
and Performance Analysts in topmost sports companies.

Experience Learning via
National & International Immersions

The SMG Immersion Program is a multi-term experiential journey that takes students across India and global hubs to explore the Sports Management and Gaming ecosystem. From corporates and leagues to studios and stadiums, students gain real-world insights and industry-ready skills.

With the SMG National Immersions, Explore India’s Key Sports & Gaming Ecosystems Across Every Term.

We believe the best classrooms have no walls. With the SMG National
Immersion, you’ll travel across India exploring sports and gaming
hubs, meeting leagues, studios, tech innovators, and creators shaping
the industry. You earn credits as you learn how real businesses
operate on the ground.

7,000 km, One Mission–
Experience India’s Sports & Gaming
Pulse.

From federations in Delhi to sporting manufacturers in Punjab. From
league operations in Mumbai to Bengaluru’s booming tech and gaming
ecosystem – this is SMG education, reimagined.

Hub 1

North

Visit SAI HQ to learn athlete pathways, explore sports federations, tour Punjab factories, dive into esports at Nodwin, and meet CXO leaders.

Hub 2

West

Learn franchise economics, new-age sports models, media rights, fitness-tech, retail supply chains, and stadium operations across Mumbai, Pune, and Ahmedabad.

Hub 3

South

Visit esports studios, retail labs, SportsTech startups, gaming leaders, and major stadiums as you explore South India’s most advanced sports and tech ecosystem.

Hub 4

East

Visit Kolkata’s legendary football clubs, explore grassroots programs, walk Bhubaneswar’s elite sports hubs, and meet innovators shaping the future of sport in the East.

The immersions listed are indicative and may change based on partner availability and unforeseen circumstances.

Explore 20+ Cities in your first term and Learn through 40+ Immersions

  • Hub 1
  • Hub 2
  • Hub 3
  • Hub 4

North

Visit SAI HQ to learn athlete pathways, explore sports federations, tour Punjab factories, dive into esports at Nodwin, and meet CXO leaders.

West

Learn franchise economics, new-age sports models, media rights, fitness-tech, retail supply chains, and stadium operations across Mumbai, Pune, and Ahmedabad.

South

Visit esports studios, retail labs, SportsTech startups, gaming leaders, and major stadiums as you explore South India’s most advanced sports and tech ecosystem.

East

Visit Kolkata’s legendary football clubs, explore grassroots programs, walk Bhubaneswar’s elite sports hubs, and meet innovators shaping the future of sport in the East.

Goa

Cruise to Goa on Cordelia, explore iron mines and a Feni distillery, and immerse in Fado music, Portuguese culture, and Goa's nightlife.

Bengaluru

Learn to build winning e-commerce strategies, explore aerospace innovation and understand how IT services became India's largest export success.

Darjeeling

Experience a rural immersion in Indo-Nepal villages and visit Darjeeling tea estates to learn brand building, culture, and sustainability.

Lucknow

Explore Uttar Pradesh's defense manufacturing, global luxury embroidery, and meet government leaders shaping a trillion-dollar economy.

The immersions listed are indicative and may change based on partner availability and unforeseen circumstances.

1 Day Immersions

Business management meets hands-on experience, giving you real-world
skills that truly stand out.

Nivia

Witness how Nivia built an Indian sports brand competing globally through innovation in manufacturing, branding, and grassroots engagement.

CARS24

Experience how Cars24 is transforming India’s used-car market through data, technology, and customer trust

ShipRocket

Step inside India’s leading logistics tech startup powering the D2C revolution and learn how innovation fuels e-commerce growth at scale.

Explore Global Sports and Gaming Hubs to Learn
League Strategy, Tech Innovation and The Business of Sport.

Learn by building AI applications to solve real world problems in
e-commerce, healthcare, education and fintech. Each year includes an AI tool development in sem 1 followed by real-world industry application in sem 2

Gaming in UAE
Trip to EPL / La-Liga

Experience Dubai’s Global Gaming &
E-sports Showcase

Dive into Dubai’s gaming and esports ecosystem through flagship expos, conferences, and live tournaments. Understand how the city attracts global publishers, hosts mega gaming events, builds esports infrastructure, and positions itself as a leading hub for digital entertainment and interactive media.

Inside the World’s Most Powerful
Football Leagues

Experience how the EPL and La Liga operate as global sports businesses. Learn how clubs manage leagues, broadcast rights, sponsorships, fan engagement, stadium operations, and international expansion—while building the world’s most valuable football ecosystems.

Enrollment Checklist
Admissions Criteria

01.
Academics

01.
Academics

Bachelor’s degree (any), Sports enthusiasts & athletes, Freshers & early career professionals (0-5 yrs) and Sports tech & e-sports entrepreneurs.

02.
Aptitude Score

02.
Aptitude Score

Scores in Masters’ Union MU-BAAT test, or submit scores in CAT/GMAT.

03.
Extra Curricular Activities

03.
Extra Curricular Activities

Applications would be evaluated for Sports & Gaming achievements and projects.

04.
Communication & Creativity

04.
Communication & Creativity

We will assess these qualities through application details, in-person or online interviews.

Who is an Ideal Candidate?

Early-Career Professionals: Freshers & professionals with 0-5+ years of experience seeking business opportunities in the sports and gaming ecosystem.

Aspiring Entrepreneurs: Individuals aiming to build ventures in sports tech, e-sports, fitness, or fan engagement.

Watch Episode Download Student Report

Application
Timeline & Process

Rounds Application Deadline MU-BAAT Test Personal Interview Application Fees Commencement Action
Round 1 11th Jan 2026 19th Jan 2026 26th Jan 2026 Onwards INR 500/- June 2026 closed
Round 2 16th Feb 2026 Upon submission of your application Within one week of your MU-BAAT submission INR 500/- June 2026 closed
Round 3 16th March 2026 Upon submission of your application Within one week of your MU-BAAT submission INR 500/- June 2026 closed
Round 4 11th April 2026 Upon submission of your application Within one week of your MU-BAAT submission INR 500/- June 2026 Apply Now

How to Build a
Winning Application

Your application is more than just a form—it’s your first pitch to the admissions team. In this student-led video, Yashovardhan, a senior at Masters’ Union, shares the ultimate blueprint to crafting a stellar application—from structuring essays to avoiding common pitfalls.

01.

Complete the
Application

01.

Complete the
Application

Requirements

Fill out your details

You will need:

  • Your latest resume - Applicants are allowed to choose their own format (needs to be clear and concise). Feel free to use our sample resume format.

  • Your qualification documents - Upload all documents related to your work experience, academics and extra-curriculars to support your application.

Upload your CAT/GMAT/GMAT Focus score

You may submit your CAT/GMAT/GMAT Focus scores in your application.

02.

Shortlisting &
Scholarship Aptitude Test

02.

Shortlisting & Scholarship Aptitude Test

Requirements

About the Online Scholarship Test

Applicants who do not have a valid CAT or GMAT score (or if you feel your score does not reflect your true potential) are required to take the MU-BAAT. If you have submitted a CAT or GMAT score and are happy with it, then you are not required to take the MU-BAAT.

The MU-BAAT is designed to evaluate:

  • Your communication and business aptitude

  • Clarity of thought and idea structuring

  • Creative and analytical thinking

You record your responses online and do not need any prior preparation. Think of the questions as a conversation with the Masters’ Union team that helps us understand you beyond your résumé.

Duration: 45-60 minutes

Format: 9 questions divided into 5 sections. The test starts with a simple, fun question and gradually moves to questions focused on your story, motivation, creativity, and analytical thinking. You will receive short breaks between sections.

Test Window:

After you submit the application and pay the application fee, our admissions team will evaluate your profile and invite you to take the MU-BAAT. You will receive a link from us typically 1-2 weeks after you submit your application. You will then have 14 days to take the test.

Sample Questions:

  • If you could shadow any business leader for one day, who would it be and what would you aim to learn?

  • A D2C skincare brand increased their ad spend, but average order value fell 20%, while new users grew. What do you think happened?

03.

Schedule In-Person
Marketing Simulation & Interview

03.

Schedule In-Person Marketing Simulation & Interview

Requirements

About In-person Business Simulation & Interview

Following a comprehensive evaluation, shortlisted applicants will receive an invitation to proceed to the interview stage.

  • If selected, applicants will be informed of the interview date, venue, and time 3–5 days prior to the interview.

  • The interviews will be conducted by distinguished faculty members and seasoned industry leaders.

04.

Admission
Decision

04.

Admission Decision

Requirements

Status of Evaluation

Based on the final decision of the admissions committee, applicants will be slotted into the following categories-

  • Applicants who have been offered admission to Masters’ Union will receive their decision along with the financial structure for the upcoming programme.

  • For applicants who are waitlisted, the admissions committee will reconvene and promote candidates from the waitlisted to the accepted pool, on a regular basis. Please note that we do not maintain a ranked waitlist. Your admission is dependent on the spots that might open up later.

  • If you’ve received a rejection email, you cannot apply in any subsequent round in the same academic year. You are welcome to re-apply to the programme in the next academic year.

Fee Structure

Rounds partially-Refundable
Admission Fee
 All 4 Years in India
Tuition Fee
 3 years in India + 1 year in US
Total Payable
Round 1 INR 50,000/- INR 18,50,000/- INR 19,00,000/-
Round 2 INR 50,000/- INR 18,50,000/- INR 19,00,000/-
Round 3 INR 90,000/- INR 18,50,000/- INR 19,40,000/-

GST will not be applicable on tuition and admission fees, as we are registered with the National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC).

  • Manoj Kohli Merit-based Scholarship
  • Rajni Thethi Scholarship for Women
  • Chairman’s Diversity Scholarship
  • MU Scholarship for Technology Leaders
  • P. Dwarakanath India-bound Scholarship
  • Pankaj Bansal Scholarship for Young Leaders
  • Founders’ Bursary for Entrepreneurs
  • Siblings Scholarship
  • Bharat Innovators Scholarship

    • Manoj Kohli Merit-based Scholarship

    The Manoj Kohli Merit-based Scholarship extends financial support to candidates with exceptional academic records and professional accomplishments. These scholarships are offered as partial waivers of the tuition fee, as decided by the admissions committee.

    Rajni Thethi Scholarship for Women

    The Rajni Thethi Scholarship for Women extends support to deserving female candidates with impressive academic and/or professional track record, along with the drive and potential to emerge as an industry leader.

    Chairman’s Diversity Scholarship

    The Chairman’s Diversity Scholarship aims at the inclusion of exceptional candidates from marginalised and underserved communities from the Indian subcontinent, such as the Northeast, Ladakh, Bhutan, and the tribal belts of the Indian hinterland.

    MU Scholarship for Technology Leaders

    The MU Scholarship for Technology Leaders is for candidates who have demonstrated technology-oriented leadership either as students or in their jobs, through innovations, patents or research, and are looking to further their career prospects in the technology domain.

    P. Dwarakanath India-bound Scholarship

    The P. Dwarakanath India-bound Scholarship is directed at Indian-origin candidates (i.e. PIO card-holders) who wish to engage with the Indian corporate sector, as well as Indian professionals currently based abroad, who wish to return to India to pursue world-class education and catapult their careers to newer heights.

    Pankaj Bansal Scholarship for Young Leaders

    The Pankaj Bansal Scholarship for Young Leaders aims to identify young professionals who have displayed exceptional drive and leadership potential through their professional projects, community service and active participation in student-led committees, clubs, and other initiatives while in college.

    Founder’s Bursary for Entrepreneurs

    The Founders’ Bursary for Entrepreneurs funds candidates who have had entrepreneurial experience, with varying levels of success, and wish to gain more skills and academic perspectives to carry on with their line of work.

    Siblings Scholarship

    The Siblings Scholarship offers financial support to candidates who have siblings in the current or previous cohorts of Masters’ Union. This scholarship recognises the continued trust placed in us by families and celebrates their shared journey within the Masters’ Union community. Awards are offered as partial waivers of the tuition fee, as decided by the admissions committee.

    Bharat Innovators Scholarship

    The Bharat Innovators Scholarship is aimed at young Indian entrepreneurs from non-metropolitan towns and villages who have launched a startup or built a minimum viable product (MVP). This scholarship supports grassroots innovators looking to scale their ventures while gaining access to world-class education, mentorship, and a thriving startup ecosystem.

    Manoj Kohli Merit-Based Scholarship

    The Manoj Kohli Merit-based Scholarship extends financial support to candidates with exceptional academic records and professional accomplishments. These scholarships are offered as partial waivers of the tuition fee, as decided by the admissions committee.

    Rajni Thethi Scholarship for Women

    The Rajni Thethi Scholarship for Women extends support to deserving female candidates with impressive academic and/or professional track record, along with the drive and potential to emerge as an industry leader.

    Chairman’s Diversity Scholarship

    The Chairman’s Diversity Scholarship aims at the inclusion of exceptional candidates from marginalised and underserved communities from the Indian subcontinent, such as the Northeast, Ladakh, Bhutan, and the tribal belts of the Indian hinterland.

    MU Scholarship For Technology Leaders

    The MU Scholarship for Technology Leaders is for candidates who have demonstrated technology-oriented leadership either as students or in their jobs, through innovations, patents or research, and are looking to further their career prospects in the technology domain.

    P. Dwarakanath India-bound Scholarship

    The P. Dwarakanath India-bound Scholarship is directed at Indian-origin candidates (i.e. PIO card-holders) who wish to engage with the Indian corporate sector, as well as Indian professionals currently based abroad, who wish to return to India in pursuit of a world-class education, that may help catapult their careers to newer heights.

    Pankaj Bansal Scholarship For Young Leaders

    The Pankaj Bansal Scholarship for Young Leaders aims to identify young professionals who have displayed exceptional drive and leadership potential through their professional projects, community service and active participation in student-led committees, clubs, and other initiatives while in college.

    Founders’ Bursary For Entrepreneurs

    The Founders’ Bursary for Entrepreneurs funds candidates who have had entrepreneurial experience, with varying levels of success, and wish to gain more skills and academic perspectives to carry on with their line of work.

    Siblings Scholarship

    The Siblings Scholarship offers financial support to candidates who have siblings in the current or previous cohorts of Masters’ Union. This scholarship recognises the continued trust placed in us by families and celebrates their shared journey within the Masters’ Union community. Awards are offered as partial waivers of the tuition fee, as decided by the admissions committee.

    Bharat Innovators Scholarship

    The Bharat Innovators Scholarship is aimed at young Indian entrepreneurs from non-metropolitan towns and villages who have launched a startup or built a minimum viable product (MVP). This scholarship supports grassroots innovators looking to scale their ventures while gaining access to world-class education, mentorship, and a thriving startup ecosystem.

    Job Prospects

    • Career Roles

      Opportunities in operations, partnerships, analytics, and brand management
      across the sports and gaming sector.

    • Industry Exposure

      Explore roles with leagues, franchises, e-sports, media houses, and emerging
      startups       shaping the industry.

    • Global Opportunities

      Access career paths and collaborations with national and international sports and
      gaming organisations      .

    Download Placement Report

    Sports & Gaming Entrepreneurs

    • Venture Creation

      Launch your own startup in sports tech or gaming with institutional and peer
      support.

    • Expert Mentorship

      Learn directly from founders, CXOs, and industry leaders driving innovation in
      sports and gaming.

    • Practical Learning

      Engage in live projects with leagues, events, and fan engagement experiences to
      gain hands-on exposure.

    Download Entrepreneurship Report

    Other Benefits

    • Placement Support

      Get assistance through resume reviews, mock interviews, and structured
      placement outreach      .

    • Networking Edge

      Build connections with professionals, alumni, and industry experts for real-world
      insights.

    • Skill Development

      Strengthen your business, analytical, and strategic leadership abilities for long-
      term growth.

    Download Placement Report

    Explore Programme

    Frequently Asked
    Questions

    • Programme Overview
    • Eligibility & Admissions
    • Learning and Outcomes
    • Admission Policies

    What is a PG Programme in Sports Management & Gaming (SMG)?

    A 16-month full-time postgraduate programme blending Masters’ Union’s business foundation with hands-on specialisations in sports management, e-sports, media, and analytics.

    What will I learn in the programme?

    Learn to run sports leagues, manage athletes, and build gaming startups in a rapidly evolving sports and digital ecosystem. Learn directly from top faculty, CXOs, ex-athletes, and sports entrepreneurs through live case studies, mentorship, and industry-led workshops. Our “learn by doing” curriculum shapes future leaders at the intersection of sports, analytics, media, and entrepreneurship.

    What is the programme structure?

    The curriculum spans 6 terms across 16 months

    • Terms 1-2: building business fundamentals

    • Terms 3-5: mastering industry-specific skills

    • Term 6: Live project with a sports or gaming organisation

    What will be the batch size of the class?

    We will limit the batch size to a maximum of 60 students to maximize individual attention from masters, and have an impactful teacher-student ratio.

    What is the eligibility criteria?

    The PGP in Sports Management & Gaming is open to candidates who have completed their undergraduate degree or will graduate by April 2026 onwards. Ideal applicants include fresh graduates, early-career professionals (0-5 years), and entrepreneurs in sports tech or e-sports.

    How do I apply?

    Click Apply Now (tag the application now link) on our website, complete the online application form, and our admissions team will reach out to you at the earliest possible time.

    Are scholarships available for the PGP SMG programme?

    Yes available for the Sports enthusiasts & athletes and Sports tech & e-sports entrepreneurs.

    How can we avail the Scholarship?

    While completing your application, you can express interest in available scholarships. Shortlisted candidates will be asked to submit supporting documents or short essays to confirm their eligibility.

    If an application has been unsuccessful, may they reapply in the next round?

    No, candidates cannot reapply in the next round. They may reapply for the next intake in the following academic year by submitting a new online application. It’s advisable to do so only if there have been significant updates or improvements to their profile since the previous application.

    Will I get to network with Industry Leaders?

    Yes you will learn and engage with our top faculties, sports & gaming founders and CXO's, ex-athletes.

    Can I work on my own startup ideas during the programme?

    Absolutely. The programme fosters entrepreneurial thinking and provides ample opportunities to apply classroom and immersion learnings to your own ventures.

    Are classes online or in-person?

    The programme follows a blended (hybrid) format, with key sessions and immersions held in person. Certain In-Class and Out-Class modules such as workshops, challenges, and mentor sessions may be conducted in hybrid mode to offer greater flexibility.

    Are the fees refunded in case applicants decide to drop out of the programme?

    Fees once paid are non-refundable. Masters’ Union reserves the right to modify this refund policy at any time without prior notice.

    Can applicants defer my admission offer from Masters' Union to the next year?

    At present, we do not offer the option to defer admission. Candidates unable to join the programme this year are encouraged to reapply for the next intake.
